organs.name: Jukkasjärvi
organs.description: Jukkasjärvi church organ (Sweden). 20 stops with tremulant and recorded release tails.
organs.license: Free sample set by Lars Palo (license text to be confirmed and bundled in the package)

organs.name: Salamander Grand Piano
organs.description: Yamaha C5 grand piano (Salamander), 88 keys with velocity layers and sustain. Loads as a single voice.
organs.attribution: Salamander Grand Piano by Alexander Holm (Yamaha C5) — CC BY 3.0
